entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sourceId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `link` TEXT NOT NULL, `publishedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isRead` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `type` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FEED', `isStarred` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

indices.name: index_feed_items_isRead
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_feed_items_isRead` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isRead`)

indices.name: index_feed_items_publishedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_feed_items_publishedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`publishedAt`)

indices.name: index_feed_items_sourceId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_feed_items_sourceId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sourceId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `isEnabled` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `lastFetched` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)
